## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run package:check`
- [ ] `npm run package:native:check`
- [ ] `npm run qa:interactions:check`
- [ ] `npm run qa:mobile:check`
- [ ] `npm run speech:doctor`
- [ ] `npm run speech:download -- --dry-run --include-optional --json`
- [ ] `npm run speech:dev-runtime -- --self-test --json`
- [ ] `npm run speech:start -- --write --json`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run qa:mobile:screenshots -- --base-url=http://127.0.0.1:3000` when browser screenshots are relevant

## Notes

Does this affect local data, sync, AI, speech, review scheduling, or user privacy?
